pkgmetadata.longdescription: OpenTelemetry FastAPI Instrumentationpypi.. pypi image httpsbadge.fury.iopyopentelemetry-instrumentation-fastapi.svg target httpspypi.orgprojectopentelemetry-instrumentation-fastapiThis library provides automatic and manual instrumentation of FastAPI web frameworks,instrumenting http requests served by applications utilizing the framework.auto-instrumentation using the opentelemetry-instrumentation package is also supported.Installation------------ pip install opentelemetry-instrumentation-fastapiReferences---------- OpenTelemetry Project httpsopentelemetry.io_ OpenTelemetry Python Examples httpsgithub.comopen-telemetryopentelemetry-pythontreemaindocsexamples_
